nasb.text: then I Myself will set My face against that man and against his family, and I will cut off from among their people both him and all those who play the harlot after him, by playing the harlot after Molech.

esv.text: then I will set my face against that man and against his clan and will cut them off from among their people, him and all who follow him in whoring after Molech.

cnv.text: 我就要向那人和他的家族變臉，把他和所有跟隨他與摩洛行邪淫的人，都從他們的族人中剪除。

ccb.text: 我必严惩那人一家，从民中铲除他和那些追随他与摩洛苟合的人。
